records.description: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO CORRECT AN ERROR THAT OCCURRED ON MODIFICATION 03 OF THIS CONTRACT WHERE $90,056.32 WAS DEOBLIGATED FROM SLIN 010101 ACRN AB AND THERE WAS ONLY $86,604.21 AVAILABLE TO DEOBLIGATE. MODIFICATION 03 WAS AWARDED ON 29 MARCH 2019, BUT DUE TO INSUFFICIENT FUNDS IT NEVER INTERFACED WITH N-ERP THEREFORE THERE IS A DISCREPANCY BETWEEN TOTAL DOLLAR AMOUNTS IN SPS AND N-ERP. THIS MODIFICATION WILL PLUS UP SLIN 010101 ACRN AB IN THE AMOUNT OF THE DELTA, $3,452.11, IN ORDER TO CORRECT THE SPS DOLLAR AMOUNTS TO MATCH N-ERP AND REFLECT A FINAL DEOBLIGATION AMOUNT OF $86,604.21.
